basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Delhi. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree in Science or Engineering (Computer Science)
qualification.details: Master's degree in Science or Engineering (Computer Science) with qualified National Level Competitive Exams (CSIR, UGC, ICMR, DBT, GATE).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 05-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Delhi Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application for the Junior Research Fellow position at AIIMS Delhi is 05 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's degree in Science or Engineering (Computer Science) and have qualified in National Level Competitive Exams like CSIR, UGC, ICMR, DBT, or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 37000 Per Month plus HRA.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow post at AIIMS Delhi.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it by post.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Junior Research Fellow position at AIIMS Delhi is contractual.
